metadata.purpose: Structured playbook dataset, recommendation scoring model, and evaluation dataset for report-defense-ready SOAR demo.
metadata.note: Use as seed/demo data. Validate IDs against existing database before replacing current PB-001..PB-010 records.

playbooks.name: External Port Scan Investigation
playbooks.description: Investigate external scanning against public-facing assets without treating PCAP as a full IDS.
playbooks.expectedOutcome: Analyst can approve a defensible response action with documented rationale and evidence.

workflowSteps.title: Collect and normalize alert context
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Required fields are present or missing fields are recorded.

workflowSteps.title: Enrich indicators and asset context
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Threat intel, asset criticality, and source reliability values are attached where available.

workflowSteps.title: Analyst validation checkpoint
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Analyst marks true positive, benign, duplicate, or needs more evidence.

workflowSteps.title: Run safe containment or prepare containment recommendation
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Only reversible actions are automated; disruptive actions require explicit approval.

workflowSteps.title: Document remediation and recovery actions
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Incident timeline, actions, residual risk, and owner are recorded.

workflowSteps.title: Update incident metrics and evaluation labels
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Historical usage and outcome data are available for future scoring.

qualityControls: Do not execute disruptive containment without analyst approval.
Record missing fields instead of silently lowering recommendation quality.
Keep explanation text tied to exact scoring components.

playbooks.name: Suspicious Process or Script Execution
playbooks.description: Investigate suspicious scripts, PowerShell, encoded commands, or abnormal parent-child process chains.
playbooks.expectedOutcome: Analyst can approve a defensible response action with documented rationale and evidence.

workflowSteps.title: Collect and normalize alert context
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Required fields are present or missing fields are recorded.

workflowSteps.title: Enrich indicators and asset context
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Threat intel, asset criticality, and source reliability values are attached where available.

workflowSteps.title: Analyst validation checkpoint
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Analyst marks true positive, benign, duplicate, or needs more evidence.

workflowSteps.title: Run safe containment or prepare containment recommendation
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Only reversible actions are automated; disruptive actions require explicit approval.

workflowSteps.title: Document remediation and recovery actions
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Incident timeline, actions, residual risk, and owner are recorded.

workflowSteps.title: Update incident metrics and evaluation labels
workflowSteps.successCriteria: Historical usage and outcome data are available for future scoring.

qualityControls: Do not execute disruptive containment without analyst approval.
Record missing fields instead of silently lowering recommendation quality.
Keep explanation text tied to exact scoring components.
